[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001 3
1 0110011 4
2 1111101 6
3 1111010 5
4 1101111 6
5 0111011 5
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 10 1111111 a match 6 7
12 21 1111111 a match 6 7
23 32 1011111 6
34 43 1011111 6
45 54 1011101 5
56 65 1010101 4
67 76 1010101 4
70 07 0111101 5

02 20 1111101 6 match 2
13 31 1111011 6
24 42 1001101 4
35 53 1010111 5
46 64 1011101 5
57 75 1010101 4
60 06 1111101 6 match 2
71 17 1111011 6

03 30 0111111 6
14 41 1111111 a match 6 7
25 52 1011101 5
36 63 1010111 5
47 74 1001101 4
50 05 1111101 6 match 2
61 16 1111110 6
72 27 1001101 4

04 40 1111101 6 match 2
15 51 1111111 a match 6 7
26 62 1011101 5
37 73 0010011 3
